introSection: Wild Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Zamperla currently travelled by Uk showman Darren Matthews

sections.title: History
sections.content: Wild Mouse has operated during the summer on the seafront in Paignton, Devon since 2009. As of August 2019, the roller coaster continues to operate, by the entrance of Paignton Pier.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Zamperla currently travelled by Uk showman Darren Matthews

Wild Mouse has operated during the summer on the seafront in Paignton, Devon since 2009. As of August 2019, the roller coaster continues to operate, by the entrance of Paignton Pier.
